business_ideas.idea: Feastables: consumer chocolate bars with collector mechanics and seasonal focus
Prime: hydration drink via creator co-marketing with Logan Paul and KSI
Rare Candy: Pokémon card marketplace with unboxing livestreams
Emma Chamberlain Coffee: coffee brand built on creator audience loyalty
Cars vs Bids: mid-tier creator business, car auction and resale platform
Kick: Twitch alternative leveraging gambling tie-in to Stake casino
WeGrow: hydroponics supplies and cannabis-adjacent business
Finger on the App: mobile game with prize pool, created by creator for audience
Dhar Mann: 18.5M subscriber daily scripted storytelling on YouTube
Ryan Hall y'all: weather education channel with unique angle on meteorology
Millennial Farmer: farming content with 1M+ YouTube audience
Cole the Corn Star: farming content pranks targeting younger demographic
Lauren Farms: female farming channel documenting daily farm operations
Niche micro-services: pressure washing, lawn mowing services built from Tiktok presence
Vending machine niche: documented vending machine operation and stocking business

predictions.text: Feastables will expand to Asian markets via localized YouTube channels in 16 languages
Kick will stabilize as creator platform if Stake remains profitable cash cow
Creator product businesses often more sustainable than solo content if ownership is held
YouTube remains 5x more valuable than other platforms for business building
